name: credential-lock
note: Deployment invariant guard. Reads active proxy_accounts from MariaDB, decrypts the same cleartext password field used by the subscription manifest/Mac configuration path, parses the rendered /etc/sing-box/config.json users array, and fails if username/password tuples differ. This makes `db = rendered = manifest = Mac config` an automated OK/NG row instead of an operator memory check. It never prints passwords; mismatch diagnostics name missing/extra usernames and password-mismatch usernames only.
